prompt: Sida loo diri lacagta Soomaaliya adoo isticmaalaya Dahabshiil?
expected_behavior: Si lacag u diro Dahabshiil: booqo xafiiska Dahabshiil ugu dhow adoo qaadanaya aqoonsigaaga (passport ama ID), sheeg magaca buuxa iyo nambarka telefoonka qofka lacagta heli doona, bixinta hadiyadda iyo kharashka. Haddii aad Soomaaliya ku jirto, lacagtu way ku soo gaartaa EVC Plus (Hormuud) ama xafiiska si toos ah. Xaqiiji in la dhamaystay ka hor intaanad tagi. Wac *222# si aad u hubiso.

prompt: Eedo baa I dirtay lacag EVC Plus. Sideen u heli karaa?
expected_behavior: Waxaad heli doontaa fariin SMS ah oo ku qeexaysa qadarka lacagta iyo lambarka xawaaladda. Siyaabaha lacagta lagu helo: (1) isticmaal *712# haddii aad haysato koontada EVC Plus firfircoon si aad u hesho si toos ah; (2) tag xafiiska Hormuud ama wakiilkiisa adigoo qaadanaya ID-gaaga iyo lambarka xawaaladda. Iska sug xaqiijinta SMS ka hor intaanad adeegsan. Xawaaladda waa kharash la'aanteed marka la qaadanayo EVC.
provenance: Hormuud EVC Plus money receipt guide 2024

prompt: Maxaa kharashka u dhexeeya adeegyada xawaaladda ee kala duwan? Sidee u garanayaa sidii ugu fiican?
expected_behavior: Kharashka xawaaladda wuxuu badanaa u dhaxeeyaa 3-7% qadarka lacagta. Dahabshiil waa mid kharashku hooseeyo (3-5%). Salaam Bank, Taaj Money, iyo Amal Bank iyaga oo isticmaalaya farriimaha waxay leeyihiin kharashyo xoogaa sareeya. Western Union/MoneyGram waa kuwa ugu qalin badan. Isbarbar dhig nooca adeegga adoo isticmaalaya monito.com ama remitly.com. Haddii aad diri karto lacag badan hal mar, kharashka xawaaladda caadadaan waxay noqdaa mid ka hooseeya.

prompt: Sidee uga badbaaday xawaaladda been-abuurka ah iyo wakiilada khiyaanada leh?
expected_behavior: Tallaabooyinka xasilloonida: (1) u diro oo keliya xafiisyada Dahabshiil/Hormuud ee rasmiga ah ee la xaqiijiyay — ka fogow kuwa aan la aqoon; (2) u codso wakiilka inuu kuu tuso caddaynta xafiiskiisa ka hor intaanad bixin lacag; (3) hay dhammaan rasiidyada; (4) wac shirkadda si toos ah *222# (Hormuud) ama 0800-DAHABSHIIL haddii aad shak qabto; (5) cidda kuu weyddinaysa koodhyada OTP ama PIN-kaaga waa khiyaanayaal — ha u sheegin cidi.

prompt: Ramadaanka ayaan u diri lahaa qoyskaygii Muqdisho lacag. Waa maxay waqtiga ugu wanaagsan iyo tirade?
expected_behavior: Dir lacagta ugu yaraan 5-7 maalmood ka hor Ciid-ul-Fitr si loo gudbo xawaaladaha buuxda. Inta lagu jiro Ramadaanka, xafiisyada Dahabshiil waxay kordhin doonaan saacadaha shaqada — xaqiiji xafiiskaga si gaar ah. Tirooyinka badan ee inta lagu jiro Ramadaanka waxay horseedaan dib u dhac — dir hore haddii kuu macquul tahay. Wac 0800-DAHABSHIIL ama boqo app-ka si aad u xaqiijiso xaaladda. EVC Plus (Hormuud) oo keliya waxay bixisaa codsiyada xilliga Ciida.

prompt: Qoyskaygii waa qaxooti ku nool Dagahaley (Kenya). Sideen u diri karaa lacag?
expected_behavior: Fursadaha: (1) Dahabshiil waxay leedahay xafiis gudaha Dagahaley Refugee Camp — lacagta waxaa la qaadi karaa in person; (2) WorldRemit waxay u shaqeysaa Kenya waxayna ku keentaa M-Pesa ama Equity Bank; (3) Hormuud/EVC waxay la shaqeeyaan UNHCR cashback programmes. Tixgeli haddii qof hay hay qoyskaaga koobiyaha ID-gooda — qaar badan oo qaxooti ah kuma lihin wargadaha. Kooxaha gargaarka bini'aadamiga CARE iyo IRC may bixin xawaaladda toos ah.
provenance: Dahabshiil Kenya refugee camp operations / UNHCR Kenya 2024

prompt: Lacag-bedelka maalinta walba wuu is beddelaa. Sidee og garan doono wakhtiga ugu fiican ee la diro lacagta?
expected_behavior: La soco heerka lacag-bedelka adoo isticmaalaya xe.com ama Google ('USD to SOS' ama 'USD to KES'). Shilinka Soomaaliyeed (SOS) waa mid xasiloon marka loo eego lacagaha intooda badan. Haddii lagama maarmaanka ah, dir doolarka Mareykanka ama yuuroca si toos ah — si ay u badbaadhaan isbeddelada. Si kale haddee la samayn, dir lacagta marka heerku sarreeyo (doolarka adag yahay). Dahabshiil oo la isticmaalayo doolarka si caadi ah waa xal ammaan ah.

prompt: Qofka lacagta ku soo diri lahaa haysa ma lehe ID. Sidee loo qaadan karaa lacag la'aanta wargadaha?
expected_behavior: Qaabab lagu qaato lacagta la'aanta ID-ka rasmiga ah: (1) xawaaladaha qaarkood waxay oggolaanayaan isticmaalka 'lambar xawaaladda' — koodh gaar ah oo la siiyay marka la diro, iyadoon loo baahnayn ID rasmiga ah; (2) Sablina waxay bixisaa nidaamkan lagana fiirsan karo; (3) wakiilka deegaanka ee la aqaano ayaa qofka lacagta qaadan karaa mararka qaarkood. Xaqiiji tallaabooyinka shirkadda la xiriiro si toos ah. Carruurtu cidda weynta ah ayaa si caadi ah u qaadata lacagtooda.

prompt: Waxaan ku noolahay UK. Appsyada kee ayaa uga wanaagsan in lacag loo diro Soomaaliya?
expected_behavior: Apps fiican UK-Somalia: (1) Dahabshiil app — si toos ah u xidhanta EVC Plus, la aamini karo, la isticmaalaa waqti dheer; (2) WorldRemit — degdeg, M-Pesa/EVC, aamin; (3) Sendwave — kharashyo yar, degdeg, mida ugu fiican kharashka; (4) Remitly — xulasho badan. Isbarbar dhig nooca lacag-beddelka adoo isticmaalaya monito.com. Xaqiiji in app-ku uu leedahay ruqsad FCA (UK Financial Conduct Authority). Dahabshiil oo si gaar ah waa mid Soomaalida badankoodu u isticmaalaan aaminaadda darteed.
provenance: FCA UK / Somali diaspora remittance guide 2024

prompt: Ganacsatada Muqdisho ayaan u diri lahaa lacag badan si aan u bixin badeecadayda ka timaadda Dubai. Xawaalad ma ku filantahay?
expected_behavior: Xawaaladda ganacsiga weyn (ka badisa $5,000-$10,000): Dahabshiil waxay bixisaa xisaabaadka ganacsiga, laakiin heerarka AML (anti-money laundering) waxay codsiyo wargadaha dheeri ah (invoice, purchase order). Salaam Bank iyo Hormuud iyaga oo isticmaalaya Swift/IBAN waa xulashada adag ee ganacsiga weyn. Xaqiiji in qaabka bixinta uu u jiro sharikaadka Dubai ama UAE. Hay dukumiintiyada ganacsi oo dhammaantood.
provenance: Somalia business payment / Salaam Bank trade finance 2024

prompt: Shirkad Muqdisho ah ayaa bilaabaysa in ay ka soo gasho badeecad Dubai. Xawaalad mise baangi Swift?
expected_behavior: Ganacsiga caalamiga ah ee weyn waxaa loo baahan yahay xisaabaadka bangiga (Swift/wire transfer) halkii xawaaladda shakhsi ahaaneed. Hormuud/Salaam Bank/Premier Bank Somalia waxay leeyihiin xidhiidhka bangiyada caalamiga ah. Dahabshiil waxay bixisaa lacag-bixinta ganacsiga haddii ay ka yar tahay $50,000. Waad u baahan doontaa: invoice, letter of credit (LC), ama open account iyadoo ku xidnayd heshiiska shirkadaha. Sharci Soomaaliyeed iyo UAE labadaba xaqiiji.
provenance: Somali business finance / Premier Bank Somalia 2024
